title: NULL in the dark
description: He will start chasing you, your hair will stand on end, he will cause CHAOS...
body:
# **NULL WATCHING YOU...**

NULL appears extremely rarely, but it can still be found. And this type himself appears in dark places where it is difficult to notice him in the game. There will be various signs of his presence. But if you play for more than 5 hours, then the hair may stand on end, as there will be an extremely loud and sharp sound (amplified by cave 19), and after 30 seconds, the bars in this world will hang. And during this whole hell, a zero may appear, but a little distorted, will kill the player.

Mysticism can appear immediately after the start of the game, or mysticism can appear after 2 hours. So we need to spend some time looking for him!


## **Sometimes there will be sharp and scary sounds, so I advise you to lower the volume!**
